content.value: As part of the 2026 Virtual Dreams cohort hosted by SIM, I developed the VR game Unyielding Flapjack! The game is a comedic pancake-flipping experience where players mix ingredients, cook pancakes, and serve customer orders in an interactive fantasy kitchen. It was built in Unity with C# and designed for Meta Quest 2 and Meta Quest 3.

items.value: **Designed and developed core VR gameplay systems** using Unity and C#, including ingredient mixing, pancake pouring, flipping mechanics, order delivery, gamemanagement, and interactive kitchen objects.
**Applied user-centered design principles** by conducting playtesting sessions, gathering feedback, and iterating on game mechanics, controls, comfort, and overall player experience.

**Collaborated with a Team of Designers and Developers**, this program required me to lead the creative direction and take primary responsibility for game design and development tasks while directing a small team of mentors and experts.

content.value: The game was showcased at the Seattle XR Conference 2026, where it received positive feedback for its creative concept and engaging VR interactions. I am currently exploring opportunities to further develop my game. The prototype is available on Itch.io and SideQuest.
